title: Manage pests and disease within a honey bee colony
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage pests and disease within a honey bee colony demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to check honey bee colony

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards associated with opening and inspecting a hive and take actions to minimise risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards associated with opening and inspecting a hive and take actions to minimise risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards associated with opening and inspecting a hive and take actions to minimise risk.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use suitable personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use suitable personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use suitable personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Select and use tools and equipment for opening and inspecting a hive
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use tools and equipment for opening and inspecting a hive?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use tools and equipment for opening and inspecting a hive.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to check honey bee colony

elements.title: Inspect hive and identify possible pests diseases and poor health

pcs.text: Inspect flight paths around hive entrance for evidence of poor health of adult bees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect flight paths around hive entrance for evidence of poor health of adult bees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect flight paths around hive entrance for evidence of poor health of adult bees.

pcs.text: Inspect the outside of hive for signs of diseased brood
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect the outside of hive for signs of diseased brood?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect the outside of hive for signs of diseased brood.

pcs.text: Open the hive and inspect colony for signs and symptoms of poor health, pests and disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Open the hive and inspect colony for signs and symptoms of poor health, pests and disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Open the hive and inspect colony for signs and symptoms of poor health, pests and disease.

pcs.text: Identify and record possible poor health, disease or pests according to signs and symptoms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record possible poor health, disease or pests according to signs and symptoms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record possible poor health, disease or pests according to signs and symptoms.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect hive and identify possible pests diseases and poor health

elements.title: Undertake field diagnosis procedures

pcs.text: Collect samples for testing and gather evidence to help with diagnosis according to symptoms and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect samples for testing and gather evidence to help with diagnosis according to symptoms and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect samples for testing and gather evidence to help with diagnosis according to symptoms and industry standards.

pcs.text: Conduct field diagnosis procedures appropriate for the pest or disease to identify likely cause
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct field diagnosis procedures appropriate for the pest or disease to identify likely cause?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct field diagnosis procedures appropriate for the pest or disease to identify likely cause.

pcs.text: Collect, secure and label samples for transport to specialist for confirmation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, secure and label samples for transport to specialist for confirmation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, secure and label samples for transport to specialist for confirmation.

pcs.text: Communicate with specialist to ascertain pest or disease identity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with specialist to ascertain pest or disease identity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with specialist to ascertain pest or disease identity.

pcs.text: Report notifiable pests and diseases to authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report notifiable pests and diseases to authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report notifiable pests and diseases to authorities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Undertake field diagnosis procedures

elements.title: Implement biosecurity and treatment measures

pcs.text: Identify biosecurity control measures and treatments for identified pest or disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify biosecurity control measures and treatments for identified pest or disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify biosecurity control measures and treatments for identified pest or disease.

pcs.text: Implement biosecurity measures or treatments to rectify pests or diseases according to treatment product label, workplace procedures and biosecurity code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement biosecurity measures or treatments to rectify pests or diseases according to treatment product label, workplace procedures and biosecurity code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement biosecurity measures or treatments to rectify pests or diseases according to treatment product label, workplace procedures and biosecurity code of practice.

pcs.text: Monitor the impact of control measures and treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the impact of control measures and treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the impact of control measures and treatments.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Implement biosecurity and treatment measures

elements.title: Monitor treatments and maintain records

pcs.text: Review the effectiveness of control measures and treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review the effectiveness of control measures and treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the effectiveness of control measures and treatments.

pcs.text: Record results of inspections and remedial actions taken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record results of inspections and remedial actions taken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record results of inspections and remedial actions taken.

pcs.text: Maintain records for future beekeeping operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records for future beekeeping operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records for future beekeeping operations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Monitor treatments and maintain records

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
